passes.title: Boston By Foot
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Offers free admission for your group on most Boston by Foot walking tours (does not include: Footloose on the Freedom Trail, Beacon with a Boo, any water-based tours, or any private tours).
source_phrases: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Offers free admission for your group on most Boston by Foot walking tours (does not include: Footloose on the Freedom Trail, Beacon with a Boo, any water-based tours, or any private tours).

passes.title: Boston Children's Museum
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. The admission fee is half price per person for up to four people. This pass has been provided by a generous contribution from the Hingham Newcomers Club.
source_phrases: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. The admission fee is half price per person for up to four people. This pass has been provided by a generous contribution from the Hingham Newcomers Club.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. This is a two for one pass to the Boston Harbor Islands and is good for up to four people. It is not good for Sunset Cruises. Reservations Recommended by calling Boston Harbor Cruises at 617-227-4321. Specify which island you plan to visit, your date of travel, and your departure and return times based on the ferry schedule. On the day of your trip, go to the Boston Harbor Cruises Ferry Center at Long Wharf in Boston or at Pemberton Point in Hull, MA. Pick up your tickets at the Will-Call window at least 15 minutes prior to your scheduled ferry departure. Present the Boston Harbor Islands Library Pass to receive your free ticket with purchase of one Harbor Islands ferry ticket.
source_phrases: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. This is a two for one pass to the Boston Harbor Islands and is good for up to four people. It is not good for Sunset Cruises. Reservations Recommended by calling Boston Harbor Cruises at 617-227-4321. Specify which island you plan to visit, your date of travel, and your departure and return times based on the ferry schedule. On the day of your trip, go to the Boston Harbor Cruises Ferry Center at Long Wharf in Boston or at Pemberton Point in Hull, MA. Pick up your tickets at the Will-Call window at least 15 minutes prior to your scheduled ferry departure. Present the Boston Harbor Islands Library Pass to receive your free ticket with purchase of one Harbor Islands ferry ticket.

passes.title: Harvard Museum of Natural  History
passes.benefit_text: This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. $6.00 Admission fee per person for up to four people. This pass also includes admission to the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology. The two museums connect on the third floor and visitors may move freely from one to the other - all for one admission price.

This pass also includes admission to the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology. The two museums connect on the third floor and visitors may move freely from one to the other - all for one admission price.

passes.title: Heritage Museums & Gardens
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Pass allows 50% off regular general admission to museum & gardens for up to 6 adults or youths (3-17 years old). Children 2 and under are admitted free.
source_phrases: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Pass allows 50% off regular general admission to museum & gardens for up to 6 adults or youths (3-17 years old). Children 2 and under are admitted free.

passes.title: Institute of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass allows up to two people a discounted rate of $10.00 each. The ICA is always free to children 17 and under. The ICA is free to the public on Thursday nights from 5:00-9:00pm.
source_phrases: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass allows up to two people a discounted rate of $10.00 each. The ICA is always free to children 17 and under. The ICA is free to the public on Thursday nights from 5:00-9:00pm.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass provides up to 4 people with $5.00 admission per person, redeemable at the admission desk. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. This pass has been provided by a generous contribution from the South Shore Ladies Club.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks
passes.benefit_text: This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. Free parking for most State parks. Must be returned no later than the day after use.
source_phrases: This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. Free parking for most State parks. Must be returned no later than the day after use.

passes.title: Museum of Fine Arts Boston
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. $15 Admission fee per person for up to 2 adults. $10 Admission fee per person for up to 4 youths 7-17.
source_phrases: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. $15 Admission fee per person for up to 2 adults. $10 Admission fee per person for up to 4 youths 7-17.

passes.title: Museum of Science
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. 50% off admission fee per person for up to 4 people.
source_phrases: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. 50% off admission fee per person for up to 4 people.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass offers a 50% discount on 4 full priced tickets. Passes do not apply to Aquarium boat programs, IMAX shows or school group visits. This pass has been provided by a generous contribution from the Hingham Newcomers Club.

passes.title: The Patriots Hall of Fame
passes.benefit_text: This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. Pass admits two people free of charge.
source_phrases: This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. Pass admits two people free of charge.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. $12 admission to general museum for up to 2 adults, children under 16 are free. Admission to the Yin Yu Tang, the Chinese house, is included in general admission, but advanced reservations are required. Access to Phillips Research library and special ticketed exhibitions also require a separate fee. Visitors using a library pass are not entitled to any other member benefits.

passes.title: Plimoth Patuxet Museums
passes.benefit_text: This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Each pass allows admission for up to 6 people at $18 for adults and $12 for children ages 5-17.

passes.title: The Trustees of Reservations GO Pass
passes.benefit_text: This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. Pass provides free or reduced admission for 2 Adults and children under 18 to Trustees properties across the state, including World's End in Hingham.

passes.title: USS Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text: This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. Free admission for up to 9 visitors.

passes.title: Zoo New England
passes.benefit_text: This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. Franklin Park Zoo in Boston and Stone Zoo in Stoneham, MA. Admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. Children 2 years and younger are free.
